title: Sources and Types of E-Waste
description: A flowchart categorizing the primary sources of e-waste and the common types of electronic equipment found within each category.
relationships: Household Source generates IT & Telecom Equipment, Consumer Electronics, and Large Household Appliances
Business/Industrial Source generates IT & Telecom Equipment and Lighting Equipment
Government/Institutional Source generates IT & Telecom Equipment and Consumer Electronics
All sources can generate Toys & Leisure Equipment
